{{Infobox character
| name = Caius Agnos
| aliases = Caius
| spouse = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Olissa Agnos]]}}
| parents = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lycus]]}}{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|, [[Andra Agnos|Andra]]}}
| children = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lycus]]}}{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|, [[Andra Agnos|Andra]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|trader}}{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|, blacksmith}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

''See also: [[Caius Agnos Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Caius [[Agnos]] is a merchant and skilled craftsman who is part of the [[Agnos family]], which includes his wife Olissa and their two children, [[Lycus]] and Andra. Originally a trader of general supplies within the realms of [[Malachi]] and [[Deborah]], he had recently been granted land on a border to settle down. He is described as a friendly, balding man with a warm smile and a stout build, though he possesses significant muscular strength. While some perceived him as a soft individual who avoided strenuous labor, he is capable of intense physical work, such as blacksmithing and hauling heavy crates. In a [[workshop]] setting, he has been observed performing complex metalwork, including repairing or joining different types of [[steel]]. During a violent encounter with an [[Incarnation]], Caius demonstrated bravery by attempting to defend himself with a smith's hammer. He later sustained a severe wound to his right side that left him in a critical, semi-conscious state, requiring urgent medicinal intervention via a healing pool.}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Caius stands at the edge of a ring of firelight with Olissa.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Caius is a person who carries large crates in the camp.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Caius is a person in the wagon with a great dark stain on his right side.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Caius was carried into [[Valinhall]] by Olissa and [[Lycus]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Caius is [[Lycus]] and Andra's father.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Caius is a [[Damascan]] trader.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caius Agnos]] is Olissa's husband and a blacksmith.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Caius is the husband of [[Olissa Agnos]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Caius was holding onto a table to catch his breath.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Caius was present in [[Simon]]'s bedroom.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
